title: Uncomment the Hidden Line
prompt_md:
## Goal
Modify the program so it prints all four lines in the correct order by uncommenting exactly one statement.

## Input
None. This program takes no input.

## Output
Print exactly four lines:
```
Alpha
Beta
Gamma
Delta
```

## Requirements
1. Remove exactly one `//` comment marker to enable a disabled statement.
2. Do not add, remove, or reorder any other statements.
3. The output must match the four lines above exactly, one per line.

title: Add Explanatory Comments
prompt_md:
## Goal
Complete the program by filling in `print_greeting()` so it prints the required greeting. The function body has a TODO stub — implement it using `std::cout`.

## Input
None. This program takes no input.

## Output
Print exactly two lines:
```
Welcome to cpproad!
Let the learning begin.
```

## Requirements
1. Implement the body of `print_greeting()` using exactly two `std::cout` statements.
2. Do not modify `main()` or the function signature.
3. Add at least one `//` comment inside `print_greeting()` explaining what it does.
4. The output must match the two lines above exactly.

## Notes
- You may use `\n` or `std::endl` to end each line.

test_cases.label: Sample: two-line greeting
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Welcome to cpproad!
Let the learning begin.

test_cases.label: Hidden: exact text match
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Welcome to cpproad!
Let the learning begin.

Welcome to cpproad!
